problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
hypothesis: Thermoelectric Seebeck coefficient maximization may resolve Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics by activating at the systems level.
